emails.subject: RE: Increased margin
emails.body: RE: Increased margin yeah we read that when it came out of all the stuff they could write about they pull that out

emails.subject: RE: Increased margin
emails.body: I know you guys are busy trying to trade right now, please call me when you and John can talk. I will come up. Sarah
